title: UI/UX Design
tagline: Interfaces that feel as good as they look.
description: We craft user experiences that are intuitive, beautiful, and built around real human behaviour. From discovery to final pixel, every decision is grounded in research and purpose.

approach.title: Discovery & Research
approach.description: We start by deeply understanding your users, competitors, and business goals through interviews, analytics, and market research.

approach.title: Wireframing & Prototyping
approach.description: Low and high-fidelity wireframes let us test ideas fast before a single line of code is written.

approach.title: Visual Design
approach.description: We create pixel-perfect designs with a consistent design system — colours, type, components — that scales with your product.

approach.title: Handoff & Support
approach.description: Developer-ready Figma files, component specs, and ongoing support to ensure the final product matches the design intent.

testimonials.quote: DotHunters redesigned our entire platform in 6 weeks. The new UI cut our support tickets by 30% — users just get it now.
testimonials.name: Amal Perera

testimonials.quote: The attention to detail in every screen was incredible. They think like product designers, not just visual designers.
testimonials.name: Samantha Lee

title: Web Development
description: We build modern web applications with clean code, great performance, and seamless UX. Whether it's a marketing site or a complex SaaS product, we deliver solutions that last.

approach.title: Tech Stack Planning
approach.description: We choose the right tools for the job — Next.js, React, Node, or headless CMS — based on your goals and scale.

approach.title: Architecture & Setup
approach.description: Clean project structure, CI/CD pipelines, and best-practice conventions established from day one.

approach.title: Development & QA
approach.description: Iterative sprints with regular demos. Every feature is tested across devices, browsers, and edge cases.

approach.title: Launch & Maintenance
approach.description: We handle deployment, performance tuning, and post-launch monitoring so you can focus on your business.

testimonials.quote: Our new site loads in under 1 second and our conversion rate jumped 40%. The code quality is excellent — our internal devs were impressed.
testimonials.name: Ravi Chandran

testimonials.quote: They delivered a fully functional SaaS MVP in 8 weeks. Clean, documented, and ready to scale.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair

title: 3D / VR & Game Development
description: We design and develop 3D environments, AR/VR applications, and interactive game experiences that push the boundaries of what's possible — for training, marketing, entertainment, and beyond.

approach.title: Concept & Storyboarding
approach.description: We map out the user journey through the 3D space — camera paths, interactions, and narrative flow.

approach.title: Asset Creation
approach.description: 3D modelling, rigging, texturing, and animation — optimised for real-time rendering or pre-rendered output.

approach.title: Engine Development
approach.description: Built in Unity or Unreal Engine, with clean scripting, physics, lighting, and platform-specific optimisation.

approach.title: Testing & Deployment
approach.description: Performance testing on target hardware, accessibility review, and deployment to PC, mobile, web, or VR headsets.

testimonials.quote: The VR training module DotHunters built reduced our onboarding time by 50%. Incredibly polished and intuitive.
testimonials.name: James Wijekoon

testimonials.quote: Our AR product demo at the trade show stopped people in their tracks. The quality of the 3D assets was outstanding.
testimonials.name: Melissa Tan

title: Motion Graphics
description: We create compelling motion content — from explainer videos and logo animations to full brand films. Motion is the fastest way to communicate complex ideas and make your brand unforgettable.

approach.title: Script & Storyboard
approach.description: Every great animation starts with a great script. We align on messaging, tone, and visual narrative before any animation begins.

approach.title: Style Frames
approach.description: Key visual moments are designed as static frames to lock in the aesthetic before full animation production.

approach.title: Animation Production
approach.description: Frame-by-frame motion, smooth transitions, and sound design — crafted in After Effects, Cinema 4D, or Lottie for web.

approach.title: Delivery
approach.description: Delivered in all required formats — MP4, GIF, Lottie JSON, or embedded web animation — optimised for every platform.

testimonials.quote: The explainer video DotHunters made for us has been our #1 sales tool. Prospects finally understand what we do in 90 seconds.
testimonials.name: Daniel Gomez

testimonials.quote: Our logo animation gave the entire brand a new energy. It's been used in every pitch deck and social post since.
testimonials.name: Anika Silva

title: Web Application Development
tagline: Powerful apps that run anywhere in the browser.
description: We build complex, data-driven web applications — dashboards, portals, booking systems, and internal tools — engineered for performance, security, and real-world scale.

approach.title: Requirements & Scoping
approach.description: We map every user role, workflow, and data flow before writing a line of code — eliminating costly surprises mid-project.

approach.title: Architecture Design
approach.description: Scalable database schemas, API contracts, and frontend component structures planned for growth from day one.

approach.title: Agile Development
approach.description: Two-week sprints with working demos after each cycle. You see real progress — not just status updates.

approach.title: QA, Launch & Support
approach.description: End-to-end testing, staging environment review, zero-downtime deployment, and post-launch monitoring.

testimonials.quote: The web app DotHunters built handles 5,000 daily active users without a hitch. Performance and reliability have been outstanding.
testimonials.name: Kevin Raj

testimonials.quote: They took our messy spreadsheet workflow and turned it into a slick app our whole team actually enjoys using.
testimonials.name: Fatima Hassan

title: SaaS Product Development
description: We partner with founders and product teams to design, build, and launch SaaS products — handling everything from MVP to multi-tenant architecture, billing integration, and growth-ready infrastructure.

approach.title: Product Strategy
approach.description: We validate your idea, define the core feature set, and create a roadmap that balances speed-to-market with long-term scalability.

approach.title: MVP Design & Build
approach.description: A lean, shippable MVP in 8–12 weeks — designed to test assumptions and start generating real user feedback immediately.

approach.title: Multi-Tenancy & Billing
approach.description: Workspace isolation, role-based permissions, Stripe billing, and subscription management built in from the ground up.

approach.title: Scale & Iterate
approach.description: Post-launch analytics, feature flagging, and sprint-based iteration to keep improving as your user base grows.

testimonials.quote: DotHunters took our napkin idea to a paying product in under 3 months. The architecture they chose has scaled with us effortlessly.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair

testimonials.quote: They understand SaaS — not just code. The billing flows, onboarding, and permission system were all handled without us having to explain the basics.
testimonials.name: Daniel Gomez

title: Mobile App Development
tagline: Native-quality apps for iOS and Android.
description: We build high-performance mobile apps using React Native and Flutter — delivering a single codebase that feels truly native on both platforms, with offline support, push notifications, and App Store-ready polish.

approach.title: UX & Prototype
approach.description: Mobile-first wireframes and interactive prototypes tested with real users before development begins.

approach.title: Cross-Platform Build
approach.description: React Native or Flutter development with shared business logic, platform-specific UI where it matters, and full offline capability.

approach.title: Integrations
approach.description: Push notifications, payment gateways, maps, camera, biometrics, and third-party APIs — all handled cleanly.

approach.title: App Store Launch
approach.description: We manage the full submission process for both App Store and Google Play, including ASO, screenshots, and metadata.

testimonials.quote: Our app hit 10k downloads in the first month. The UX is smooth and our users keep coming back — that's a direct result of DotHunters' work.
testimonials.name: Amal Perera

testimonials.quote: They built both iOS and Android from one codebase and neither platform felt like a compromise. Genuinely impressive.
testimonials.name: Ravi Chandran

title: Video Production
description: From concept to final cut — we produce brand films, product videos, social content, and corporate documentaries. Our in-house team combines cinematic storytelling with strategic messaging to create video that converts.

approach.title: Creative Brief
approach.description: We define the message, audience, tone, and distribution channels — so every creative decision serves a clear purpose.

approach.title: Pre-Production
approach.description: Script writing, storyboarding, location scouting, casting, and shot lists — every detail planned before the camera rolls.

approach.title: Production
approach.description: Professional filming with our crew and equipment, or remote direction of client-side footage — flexible to your setup.

approach.title: Post-Production
approach.description: Editing, colour grading, sound design, motion graphics, and subtitle delivery in all required formats and aspect ratios.

testimonials.quote: The brand film DotHunters produced for our rebrand was cinematic-level quality. It set the tone for everything we did that year.
testimonials.name: Anika Silva

testimonials.quote: Our product video has been embedded on our homepage for 8 months and is still our highest-converting piece of content.
testimonials.name: Kevin Raj
